title: The Harvest of Ashes
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A seed inspector discovers that the state harvest is poisoning the future.
long_description:
The Harvest of Ashes follows Talia Rusk, an adult seed inspector, through a fire-scarred grain valley as a seed inspector discovers that the state harvest is poisoning the future. The inquiry moves through offices, sealed rooms, public hearings, and physical evidence, keeping its suspense grounded in work, speech, and consequence.

As Eamon Vale, Sera Holt, and Dr. Petra Saye help test the record, Oren Voss tries to turn delay into truth. The novel is clean adult suspense about institutions, memory, and the cost of naming what everyone was paid not to see.
